message:
feat(http): add HTTP/1.1 client/server implementation module

Introduce src/http/h1/ directory with full HTTP/1.1 protocol support:

- mod.rs: Module organization and public exports
- codec.rs: Request/response codec with chunked transfer encoding,
  keep-alive connection handling, and proper HTTP message framing
- client.rs: Async HTTP/1.1 client with connection pooling integration,
  request pipelining support, and automatic redirect following
- server.rs: HTTP/1.1 server connection handler with request dispatch,
  graceful shutdown, and concurrent request limiting
- types.rs: Shared types for headers, methods, status codes, and
  version negotiation between client and server

This module provides the foundation for asupersync's native HTTP stack,
complementing the existing tower-based adapter approach with a
zero-allocation-path-optimized implementation for high-throughput
scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
